name: GeneRally 2
short_description: GeneRally 2 is a top-down arcade racing game with a built-in track editor. Challenge the track records in time-trial; compete on the sofa with friends; or race online against people from around the world!
detailed_description:
Now with Online Multiplayer!

You can now race online with your friends, or other players from around the world. Enjoy racing with our full fleet of 10 cars and over 1000 community-made tracks!


About the Game

GeneRally 2 is a friendly top-down arcade racing game - with an easy-to-use, built-in track editor. GeneRally 2 is the sequel to the 2002 classic, GeneRally - one of the most played arcade racing games of all time! Have fun racing alone against computer-controlled opponents; with your friends in "no split-screen necessary" couch PvP; online with players from around the world; or try your hand at creating tracks and sharing them with the community!

GeneRally 2 is on the home stretch of Early Access - and will soon be reaching v1.0.

Features

  • Top-down arcade racing game fun! The gameplay is easy to pick up, but with plenty of room for mastery.

  • Race online or offline - with friends, or against computer-controlled opponents! With online multiplayer, you can race with GeneRally 2 players from all over the world - but you can also gather up to 7 friends and play in no-splitscreen-necessary couch co-op!

  • 10 unique cars. Rally, Single-Seater, Stock Car, Monster Truck, GT - you name it! Each car has its own performance characteristics and unique handling model. And more cars are being added on a regular basis!

  • Over 1000 tracks (and counting)... Our community has produced over a thousand tracks to date, and more are being created every day and uploaded to Steam Workshop. If that's not enough, create your own tracks, or import and race any of the tens of thousands that were created for GeneRally 1!

  • Build your own tracks. Using our built-in track editor, making the racing circuits of your dreams couldn't be easier! No special knowledge required. Join our track-making community and share your creations with the world.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain*, Finnish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Spanish - Latin America*, Turkish*, French*, Russian*, Polish*, Japanese*, Italian*
*languages with full audio support
